---
title: "Schedule"
---

| Title | Location | Date | Time | Speaker |
|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|
| ODEFormer | PSC Lab 2 | 6 May 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | Cass |
| TBD | PSC Lab 2 | 13 May 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | Abiel |
| Reverse Engineering Human Preferences with RL | PSC Lab 2 | 20 May 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | [Lisa](https://lisaalaz.github.io) |
| TBD | PSC Lab 2 | 27 May 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | Jixiang |
| Score Matching with Missing Data | PSC Lab 2 | 3 June 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | [Josh](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=mv0ieOsAAAAJ&hl=en) |
| High-Dimensional Neuronal Activity from Low-Dimensional Latent Dynamics | PSC Lab 2 | 10 June 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | [Valentin](https://sites.google.com/view/valentinschmutz) |
| TBD | PSC Lab 2 | 17 June 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | Chris |
| TBD | PSC Lab 2 | 24 June 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm | Andreas |
